content.full_text:
November 10, 2004

Bill Rihn
31681 Third Avenue
Laguna Beach, CA 92651

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-239

Dear Mr. Rihn:

This letter confirms the receipt of your request for advice regarding the duties of an unnamed committee under the Political Reform Act ("Act")1. Under the provisions of California Code of Regulations section 18329(b)(8)(B), unless you are an authorized representative of the committee for which you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis regarding whether the Form 410 requirements apply to the unnamed committee.

I have enclosed a copy of regulation 18329 for your review.

If you believe a violation of the Political Reform Act has occurred, you may file the enclosed complaint form with our Enforcement Division.

Should you have any additional questions with regard to this matter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel

Enclosure
JWW:jg

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
